'''ây-f-ch''' ('''kayafach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monogrammatize|monogrammatize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monogrammatize|monogrammatize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-f-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kayafach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyafach|thiyafach]] || [[word:jiyafach|jiyafach]] || [[word:shiyafach|shiyafach]] || [[word:kiyafach|kiyafach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyafach|thuthuyafach]] || [[word:jujuyafach|jujuyafach]] || [[word:shushuyafach|shushuyafach]] || [[word:kukuyafach|kukuyafach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyafach|thuyafach]] || [[word:juyafach|juyafach]] || [[word:shuyafach|shuyafach]] || [[word:kuyafach|kuyafach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyafach|thuyafach]] || [[word:juyafach|juyafach]] || [[word:shuyafach|shuyafach]] || [[word:kuyafach|kuyafach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyafach|theyafach]] || [[word:jeyafach|jeyafach]] || [[word:sheyafach|sheyafach]] || [[word:keyafach|keyafach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyafach|thothoyafach]] || [[word:jojoyafach|jojoyafach]] || [[word:shoshoyafach|shoshoyafach]] || [[word:kokoyafach|kokoyafach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyafach|thoyafach]] || [[word:joyafach|joyafach]] || [[word:shoyafach|shoyafach]] || [[word:koyafach|koyafach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyafach|thoyafach]] || [[word:joyafach|joyafach]] || [[word:shoyafach|shoyafach]] || [[word:koyafach|koyafach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyafach|thĂŠyafach]] || [[word:jĂŠyafach|jĂŠyafach]] || [[word:shĂŠyafach|shĂŠyafach]] || [[word:kĂŠyafach|kĂŠyafach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayafach|thathayafach]] || [[word:jajayafach|jajayafach]] || [[word:shashayafach|shashayafach]] || [[word:kakayafach|kakayafach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayafach|thayafach]] || [[word:jayafach|jayafach]] || [[word:shayafach|shayafach]] || [[word:kayafach|kayafach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayafach|thayafach]] || [[word:jayafach|jayafach]] || [[word:shayafach|shayafach]] || [[word:kayafach|kayafach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayafach|shayafach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayafach|goshayafach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayafach|gokishayafach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayafachnĂŒ|shayafachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayafachnknĂŒ|goshayafachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafachnĂŒ|gokishayafachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayafachshĂ«|shayafachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayafachnkshĂ«|goshayafachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayafachshĂ«|gokishayafachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafachro|shayafachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafachnkro|goshayafachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafachro|gokishayafachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafachmu|shayafachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafachnkmu|goshayafachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafachmu|gokishayafachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayafachsher|shayafachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayafachnksher|goshayafachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayafachsher|gokishayafachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayafachng|shayafachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayafachnkng|goshayafachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayafachng|gokishayafachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayafachya|shayafachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayafachnkya|goshayafachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayafachya|gokishayafachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayafachyam|shayafachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayafachnkyam|goshayafachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayafachyam|gokishayafachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayafachnĂŒshĂ«|shayafachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayafachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayafachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayafachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayafachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafachnĂŒro|shayafachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafachnknĂŒro|goshayafachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafachnĂŒro|gokishayafachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafachnĂŒmu|shayafachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafachnknĂŒmu|goshayafachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafachnĂŒmu|gokishayafachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayafachshĂ«nĂŒ|shayafachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayafachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayafachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayafachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafachshĂ«ro|shayafachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafachnkshĂ«ro|goshayafachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafachshĂ«ro|gokishayafachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafachshĂ«mu|shayafachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafachnkshĂ«mu|goshayafachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafachshĂ«mu|gokishayafachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayafachronĂŒ|shayafachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayafachnkronĂŒ|goshayafachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafachronĂŒ|gokishayafachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayafachroshĂ«|shayafachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayafachnkroshĂ«|goshayafachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayafachroshĂ«|gokishayafachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafachromu|shayafachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafachnkromu|goshayafachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafachromu|gokishayafachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayafachmunĂŒ|shayafachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayafachnkmunĂŒ|goshayafachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafachmunĂŒ|gokishayafachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayafachmushĂ«|shayafachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayafachnkmushĂ«|goshayafachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayafachmushĂ«|gokishayafachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafachmuro|shayafachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafachnkmuro|goshayafachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafachmuro|gokishayafachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|718161e}}
